description: Haskell para Termux no Android ARM64. Inclui GHC via ghcup e HLS (Haskell Language Server) para autocompletar, diagnósticos e type-checking em tempo real.

install_steps.command: pkg update -y 2>&1 && pkg install -y curl libffi libgmp 2>&1
curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://get-ghcup.haskell.org | BOOTSTRAP_HASKELL_NONINTERACTIVE=1 BOOTSTRAP_HASKELL_MINIMAL=1 sh 2>&1 && echo 'OK: ghcup instalado'
source $HOME/.ghcup/env 2>/dev/null && ghcup install ghc recommended 2>&1 && ghcup set ghc recommended 2>&1 && echo 'OK: GHC instalado'
source $HOME/.ghcup/env 2>/dev/null && ghcup install hls latest 2>&1 && ghcup set hls latest 2>&1 && echo 'OK: HLS instalado'
source $HOME/.ghcup/env 2>/dev/null && ghcup install cabal latest 2>&1 && echo 'OK: cabal instalado'

config_steps.command: test -f $HOME/.ghcup/bin/haskell-language-server-wrapper && echo 'HLS OK' || echo 'AVISO: HLS não encontrado'

sdk_config.new_project_cmd: cabal init -n --is-executable --main-is=Main --package-name=$name $name && cd $name && echo 'OK: projeto Haskell criado'
